form.formComment: Was at big odds at debut, ran last at Chepstow on March 15 over 3200m, slow track; 101 len behind Cool Customer carrying 69kg at $34. Fitter but others look better placed.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having raced just once last campaign finished fourth in a small field at Lingfield All Weather on January 19 over 3200m, 2.25 len behind Broken Vow with 71kg at $2.80. First up last campaign finished third of 11 runners at Southwell on November 14 over 3200m, on slow going 4.5 len behind Vango Can Go with 71kg at $3. Great chance to open his account.

form.formComment: Having third race start. Was promising at first race start finished third of 12 starters at Warwick on December 11 over 3200m, 9 len behind Old Clayesmorian with 69.5kg at $13. Went for a break before returning finished third of 10 runners at Haydock Park on March 5 over 3100m, 8 len behind Turbocharged carrying 70.5kg at $12. Top chance.

form.formComment: Five-year-old gelding by Frammassone out of Talent To Amuse has taken a long time to make it to the track. Having his first start today. Making race debut here. Might just need this run but watch the market.
